name: Jane Smith
bio: Jane is a freelance 3D environment artist with over eight years of experience in the games industry. She has contributed to titles across mobile, console, and PC platforms, specialising in stylised and realistic environment art. Previously she worked at Rockstar North and Ninja Kiwi before going freelance in 2022.
short_bio: Freelance 3D environment artist based in Glasgow with 8+ years of industry experience.
